#__SETUP__#: Rename to config.json and set CWDir / DbsContentApiDir in ExampleMod.csproj.
#__STEP1__#: Build asset bundles in Unity, then set these paths.
#__STEP2__#: Run dotnet build and dotnet build -c Release, then set these paths.
#__STEP3__#: Set SteamCMD login and installation path, then run publish_or_update_the_mod.ps1.
#__NOTE__#: SteamUsername is your login name, not your display name.
#__STEP4__#: Subscribe to your mod on Workshop, then set this folder path.
